notes: Form-binary archetype: visible box + check/dash indicator + label. Three render states (unchecked, checked, indeterminate) layered on standard interaction states.
Variant pair is filled (solid box-on) + outlined (border-only off, filled on). No soft/ghost — the indicator surface must always render.
Roles brand|danger|warning|info|success|neutral remap via [data-role=...] overriding --brand-* palette vars at the component scope (see checkbox.css).
aria-invalid='true' forces danger-coloured border and (when checked) danger-coloured fill, regardless of role. Invalid is a STATE, not a role.
Label is an optional slot — checkbox without a label is valid (icon-only or grid usage). Required-marker glyph and color are tokenised.
